use_cases: Two-factor authentication code entry for secure login flows
Phone or email verification during user registration
Account recovery code input for password reset processes
Promotional coupon or gift card code entry during checkout
ai_summary: A flexible one-time password (OTP) input component featuring customizable variants, sizes, and states with keyboard navigation support. Built with motion/react for animations and CVA for consistent styling across default, destructive, and size configurations. Ideal for authentication flows requiring secure verification code entry.
